fault_hypothesis: The code on line 82 incorrectly removes a duplicate element from the `merged` list when both input lists end with the same value. This violates the requirement to preserve all duplicates.

spec.expr: not (left and right and left[-1] == right[-1]) or (len(merged__1) >= 2 and merged__1[-1] == merged__1[-2])

constraints.intent: If inputs end with the same price, the merged list must have two copies at its tail.
The list length must be the sum of input lengths after this branch.
The list length must be correct when the special-case check is not triggered.
The final list must contain all elements from both inputs.
